hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use nested loops: outer loop for rows, inner loop for bricks in each row

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Odd rows (0, 2, 4...) start at x=0 with 5 bricks

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Even rows (1, 3, 5...) start at x=-10 with 6 bricks

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use modulo (%) to check if a row number is odd or even

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Each brick is 20 wide and 10 tall
